'''jopavaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:eubouliatic|eubouliatic]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-p-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:eubouliatic|eubouliatic]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| jopavaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:jopavithi|jopavithi]] || [[word:jopaviji|jopaviji]] || [[word:jopavishi|jopavishi]] || [[word:jopaviki|jopaviki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:jopavuthuthu|jopavuthuthu]] || [[word:jopavujuju|jopavujuju]] || [[word:jopavushushu|jopavushushu]] || [[word:jopavukuku|jopavukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:jopavuthu|jopavuthu]] || [[word:jopavuju|jopavuju]] || [[word:jopavushu|jopavushu]] || [[word:jopavuku|jopavuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:jopavufthuf|jopavufthuf]] || [[word:jopavufjuf|jopavufjuf]] || [[word:jopavufshuf|jopavufshuf]] || [[word:jopavufkuf|jopavufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jopavethe|jopavethe]] || [[word:jopaveje|jopaveje]] || [[word:jopaveshe|jopaveshe]] || [[word:jopaveke|jopaveke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jopavothotho|jopavothotho]] || [[word:jopavojojo|jopavojojo]] || [[word:jopavoshosho|jopavoshosho]] || [[word:jopavokoko|jopavokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jopavotho|jopavotho]] || [[word:jopavojo|jopavojo]] || [[word:jopavosho|jopavosho]] || [[word:jopavoko|jopavoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jopavofthof|jopavofthof]] || [[word:jopavofjof|jopavofjof]] || [[word:jopavofshof|jopavofshof]] || [[word:jopavofkof|jopavofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfthĂŻf|jopavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfjĂŻf|jopavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfshĂŻf|jopavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfkĂŻf|jopavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|jopavĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|jopavĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|jopavĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|jopavĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfthĂŻf|jopavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfjĂŻf|jopavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfshĂŻf|jopavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfkĂŻf|jopavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfthĂŻf|jopavĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfjĂŻf|jopavĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfshĂŻf|jopavĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:jopavĂŻfkĂŻf|jopavĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jopavĂŠthĂŠ|jopavĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:jopavĂŠjĂŠ|jopavĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:jopavĂŠshĂŠ|jopavĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:jopavĂŠkĂŠ|jopavĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jopavathatha|jopavathatha]] || [[word:jopavajaja|jopavajaja]] || [[word:jopavashasha|jopavashasha]] || [[word:jopavakaka|jopavakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jopavatha|jopavatha]] || [[word:jopavaja|jopavaja]] || [[word:jopavasha|jopavasha]] || [[word:jopavaka|jopavaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jopavafthaf|jopavafthaf]] || [[word:jopavafjaf|jopavafjaf]] || [[word:jopavafshaf|jopavafshaf]] || [[word:jopavafkaf|jopavafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:jopavasha|jopavasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:jopavshĂ«sha|jopavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jopavrosha|jopavrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jopavmusha|jopavmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:jopavyasha|jopavyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojopavnkshĂ«sha|gojopavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojopavnkrosha|gojopavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojopavnkmusha|gojopavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojopavnkyasha|gojopavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:jopapavasha|jopapavasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jopapavshĂ«sha|jopapavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jopapavrosha|jopapavrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jopapavmusha|jopapavmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jopapavyasha|jopapavyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojopapavnkshĂ«sha|gojopapavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojopapavnkrosha|gojopapavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojopapavnkmusha|gojopapavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojopapavnkyasha|gojopapavnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:jepĂŠvasha|jepĂŠvasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jepĂŠvshĂ«sha|jepĂŠvshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jepĂŠvrosha|jepĂŠvrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jepĂŠvmusha|jepĂŠvmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jepĂŠvyasha|jepĂŠvyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojepĂŠvnkshĂ«sha|gojepĂŠvnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojepĂŠvnkrosha|gojepĂŠvnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojepĂŠvnkmusha|gojepĂŠvnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojepĂŠvnkyasha|gojepĂŠvnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:jopfavasha|jopfavasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:jopfavshĂ«sha|jopfavshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:jopfavrosha|jopfavrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:jopfavmusha|jopfavmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:jopfavyasha|jopfavyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gojopfavnkshĂ«sha|gojopfavnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gojopfavnkrosha|gojopfavnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gojopfavnkmusha|gojopfavnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gojopfavnkyasha|gojopfavnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|5445898}}
